TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Rapa Nui 復活節島 == Takaray sowal O tadasawaliay no Satimolan Kitakit ko aro' nona pala,o Sipanya ko sa'ayaway a mi'eco tona kitakit, sa pangangan han no Sipanya to (Isla de Pascua),nikawrira, o (Rapa Nui) hananay no itinitiniay a Yuencumin, ono Ikilis i hananay.O aro' nona kitakit i i sa'etip no Cili to 3600 tahira i 3700 kilo ko ra'ay,noni'ecoan ho no Cili a kitakit tahanini. Itini tona polong no kitakita i hekal i o tadasamalayay ko kamaro'an no Rapa Nui, o samangataay a pala to iraay ko tamdaw a maro' a pala i o Pitoken Palaoalan, 2,075 kilo ko raay (ma'eden kinatolo mitaliyok to Taiwan) ,o tireng nona pala i mato o toloay a poko', sa o toloay a cilamalay tokos ko molotatirengan no na kitakit. Itiyaho I 1722miheca o mikalicay to tamina a Olanta a tamdaw ko sa'ayaway a pakahera tona pala, toya romi'ad matatangaay to katapi'elalan nani mapatay ci Yiesu,sa pangangan han to Easter Island, nikawrira, imatini I to'or hananay to ko sowal no itinitiniay a Yuencuming to Rapa Nui. Likisi Matiya o 'Amis a tamdaw ira ko sowal nika awa ko tilid, saka 'awaay ko mahapinangay a likisi no Rapa Nui.nikawrira, iraay ko cecay a kimad tahanini a mapakitoh,o ta'as nganra o kakita'an ci Hotu Matu'a hakelongen ningra ko fafahi ato wawa a mikalic to dodang a pahicera itini ton pala. O tilid Itira I ngata no mi'ot'otan a fakeloh a tamdaw I ira a mahela no mikakinkiway a tamdaw ko kakafahekaan a kinis a sapad, pangang han to "o somowalay a sapad"hananay,nikawrira, masakasak no citanengay a tamdaw.Na tayni ko mipatenakay to sowal ni Yiso a Yoropa a tamdaw I,todohen nangra kona "somowalay a sapad"to sapipalasawadaw to tilid no RapaNui,tada malemed ira ko cecay a tamdaw tangsolen ningra ami'afas a misimed ko 25 a pecih nona sapad, kalasapaden no tamina a milaliw tayra I roma a pala a milimek,sa iraira aca a ma'osaw kona 25 a pecih a sapad,o tamaanay to a dafong to sapido'edoan a mikinkiw to rayray no 'orip non apala. ona"somawalay a sapad"tosa a laya' ko to'edaw,irawac nona sapad I mikiskisan to wadis no foting,anoca o adicaw a fokeloh ko sapito'to' to masamaamaanay a tilid, ira ko foting,ira ko 'ayam,ira ko rengoshdr sa'iwas, ira ho ko masalipaay,masapoko'ay a kinis,nikawrira, ona"somawalay a sapad"tahanini away ho ko malaheciay ko fana' tona masamaamaanay a konis o maan ko nisowalan nira hokiya? o pecih a tilid no to'asay no Rapa Nui konini.
S.PHON: == rapa no~u~ui **** == takaraj so~uwaɾ o~u taɬ~ɮasawaɾiaj no~u satimo~uɾan kitakit ko~u aro~uʡ no~una paɾa,o~u sipanja ko~u saʡajawaj a miʡəʦo~u to~una kitakit, sa paŋaŋan ħan no~u sipanja to~u (isɾa ɬ~ɮə pasʦo~u~ua),nikawrira, o~u (rapa no~u~ui) ħananaj no~u itinitiniaj a jo~u~uənʦo~u~umin, o~uno~u ikiɾis i ħananaj.o~u aro~uʡ no~una kitakit i i saʡətip no~u ʦiɾi to~u **** taħira i **** kiɾo~u ko~u raʡaj,no~uniʡəʦo~uan ħo~u no~u ʦiɾi a kitakit taħanini. itini to~una po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakita i ħəkaɾ i o~u taɬ~ɮasamaɾajaj ko~u kamaro~uʡan no~u rapa no~u~ui, o~u samaŋataaj a paɾa to~u iraaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ a paɾa i o~u pito~ukən paɾao~uaɾan, *,*** kiɾo~u ko~u raaj (maʡəɬ~ɮən kinato~uɾo~u mitaɾijo~uk to~u taiwan) ,o~u tirəŋ no~una paɾa i mato~u o~u to~uɾo~uaj a po~uko~uʡ, sa o~u to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɾamaɾaj to~uko~us ko~u mo~uɾo~utatirəŋan no~u na kitakit. itijaħo~u i ****miħəʦa o~u mikaɾiʦaj to~u tamina a o~uɾanta a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u saʡajawaj a pakaħəra to~una paɾa, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ matataŋaaj to~u katapiʡəɾaɾan nani mapataj ʦi jiəso~u~u,sa paŋaŋan ħan to~u əastər isɾanɬ~ɮ, nikawrira, imatini i to~uʡo~ur ħananaj to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u itinitiniaj a jo~u~uənʦo~u~umiŋ to~u rapa no~u~ui. ɾikisi matija o~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u so~uwaɾ nika awa ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, saka ʡawaaj ko~u maħapinaŋaj a ɾikisi no~u rapa no~u~ui.nikawrira, iraaj ko~u ʦəʦaj a kimaɬ~ɮ taħanini a mapakito~uħ,o~u taʡas ŋanra o~u kakitaʡan ʦi ħo~uto~u~u mato~u~uʡa ħakəɾo~uŋən niŋra ko~u fafaħi ato~u wawa a mikaɾiʦ to~u ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ a paħiʦəra itini to~un paɾa. o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ itira i ŋata no~u miʡo~utʡo~utan a fakəɾo~uħ a tamɬ~ɮaw i ira a maħəɾa no~u mikakinkiwaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kakafaħəkaan a kinis a sapaɬ~ɮ, paŋaŋ ħan to~u "o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"ħananaj,nikawrira, masakasak no~u ʦitanəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.na tajni ko~u mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ ni jiso~u a jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw i,to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən naŋra ko~una "so~umo~uwaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u rapano~u~ui,taɬ~ɮa maɾəməɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw taŋso~uɾən niŋra amiʡafas a misiməɬ~ɮ ko~u ** a pəʦiħ no~una sapaɬ~ɮ, kaɾasapaɬ~ɮən no~u tamina a miɾaɾiw tajra i ro~uma a paɾa a miɾimək,sa iraira aʦa a maʡo~usaw ko~una ** a pəʦiħ a sapaɬ~ɮ,o~u tamaanaj to~u a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan a mikinkiw to~u rajraj no~u ʡo~urip no~un apaɾa. o~una"so~umawaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"to~usa a ɾajaʡ ko~u to~uʡəɬ~ɮaw,irawaʦ no~una sapaɬ~ɮ i mikiskisan to~u waɬ~ɮis no~u fo~utiŋ,ano~uʦa o~u aɬ~ɮiʦaw a fo~ukəɾo~uħ ko~u sapito~uʡto~uʡ to~u masamaamaanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u fo~utiŋ,ira ko~u ʡajam,ira ko~u rəŋo~usħɬ~ɮr saʡiwas, ira ħo~u ko~u masaɾipaaj,masapo~uko~uʡaj a kinis,nikawrira, o~una"so~umawaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"taħanini awaj ħo~u ko~u maɾaħəʦiaj ko~u fanaʡ to~una masamaamaanaj a ko~unis o~u maan ko~u niso~uwaɾan nira ħo~ukija? o~u pəʦiħ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u to~uʡasaj no~u rapa no~u~ui ko~unini.
S.FORM: == Rapa Nui 復活節島 == Takaray sowal O tadasawaliay no Satimolan Kitakit ko aro' nona pala,o Sipanya ko sa'ayaway a mi'eco tona kitakit, sa pangangan han no Sipanya to (Isla de Pascua),nikawrira, o (Rapa Nui) hananay no itinitiniay a Yuencumin, ono Ikilis i hananay.O aro' nona kitakit i i sa'etip no Cili to 3600 tahira i 3700 kilo ko ra'ay,noni'ecoan ho no Cili a kitakit tahanini. Itini tona polong no kitakita i hekal i o tadasamalayay ko kamaro'an no Rapa Nui, o samangataay a pala to iraay ko tamdaw a maro' a pala i o Pitoken Palaoalan, 2,075 kilo ko raay (ma'eden kinatolo mitaliyok to Taiwan) ,o tireng nona pala i mato o toloay a poko', sa o toloay a cilamalay tokos ko molotatirengan no na kitakit. Itiyaho I 1722miheca o mikalicay to tamina a Olanta a tamdaw ko sa'ayaway a pakahera tona pala, toya romi'ad matatangaay to katapi'elalan nani mapatay ci Yiesu,sa pangangan han to Easter Island, nikawrira, imatini I to'or hananay to ko sowal no itinitiniay a Yuencuming to Rapa Nui. Likisi Matiya o 'Amis a tamdaw ira ko sowal nika awa ko tilid, saka 'awaay ko mahapinangay a likisi no Rapa Nui.nikawrira, iraay ko cecay a kimad tahanini a mapakitoh,o ta'as nganra o kakita'an ci Hotu Matu'a hakelongen ningra ko fafahi ato wawa a mikalic to dodang a pahicera itini ton pala. O tilid Itira I ngata no mi'ot'otan a fakeloh a tamdaw I ira a mahela no mikakinkiway a tamdaw ko kakafahekaan a kinis a sapad, pangang han to "o somowalay a sapad"hananay,nikawrira, masakasak no citanengay a tamdaw.Na tayni ko mipatenakay to sowal ni Yiso a Yoropa a tamdaw I,todohen nangra kona "somowalay a sapad"to sapipalasawadaw to tilid no RapaNui,tada malemed ira ko cecay a tamdaw tangsolen ningra ami'afas a misimed ko 25 a pecih nona sapad, kalasapaden no tamina a milaliw tayra I roma a pala a milimek,sa iraira aca a ma'osaw kona 25 a pecih a sapad,o tamaanay to a dafong to sapido'edoan a mikinkiw to rayray no 'orip non apala. ona"somawalay a sapad"tosa a laya' ko to'edaw,irawac nona sapad I mikiskisan to wadis no foting,anoca o adicaw a fokeloh ko sapito'to' to masamaamaanay a tilid, ira ko foting,ira ko 'ayam,ira ko rengoshdr sa'iwas, ira ho ko masalipaay,masapoko'ay a kinis,nikawrira, ona"somawalay a sapad"tahanini away ho ko malaheciay ko fana' tona masamaamaanay a konis o maan ko nisowalan nira hokiya? o pecih a tilid no to'asay no Rapa Nui konini.
S.PHON: == rapa no~u~ui **** == takaraj so~uwaɾ o~u taɬ~ɮasawaɾiaj no~u satimo~uɾan kitakit ko~u aro~uʡ no~una paɾa,o~u sipanja ko~u saʡajawaj a miʡəʦo~u to~una kitakit, sa paŋaŋan ħan no~u sipanja to~u (isɾa ɬ~ɮə pasʦo~u~ua),nikawrira, o~u (rapa no~u~ui) ħananaj no~u itinitiniaj a jo~u~uənʦo~u~umin, o~uno~u ikiɾis i ħananaj.o~u aro~uʡ no~una kitakit i i saʡətip no~u ʦiɾi to~u **** taħira i **** kiɾo~u ko~u raʡaj,no~uniʡəʦo~uan ħo~u no~u ʦiɾi a kitakit taħanini. itini to~una po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakita i ħəkaɾ i o~u taɬ~ɮasamaɾajaj ko~u kamaro~uʡan no~u rapa no~u~ui, o~u samaŋataaj a paɾa to~u iraaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ a paɾa i o~u pito~ukən paɾao~uaɾan, *,*** kiɾo~u ko~u raaj (maʡəɬ~ɮən kinato~uɾo~u mitaɾijo~uk to~u taiwan) ,o~u tirəŋ no~una paɾa i mato~u o~u to~uɾo~uaj a po~uko~uʡ, sa o~u to~uɾo~uaj a ʦiɾamaɾaj to~uko~us ko~u mo~uɾo~utatirəŋan no~u na kitakit. itijaħo~u i ****miħəʦa o~u mikaɾiʦaj to~u tamina a o~uɾanta a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u saʡajawaj a pakaħəra to~una paɾa, to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ matataŋaaj to~u katapiʡəɾaɾan nani mapataj ʦi jiəso~u~u,sa paŋaŋan ħan to~u əastər isɾanɬ~ɮ, nikawrira, imatini i to~uʡo~ur ħananaj to~u ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u itinitiniaj a jo~u~uənʦo~u~umiŋ to~u rapa no~u~ui. ɾikisi matija o~u ʡamis a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ko~u so~uwaɾ nika awa ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, saka ʡawaaj ko~u maħapinaŋaj a ɾikisi no~u rapa no~u~ui.nikawrira, iraaj ko~u ʦəʦaj a kimaɬ~ɮ taħanini a mapakito~uħ,o~u taʡas ŋanra o~u kakitaʡan ʦi ħo~uto~u~u mato~u~uʡa ħakəɾo~uŋən niŋra ko~u fafaħi ato~u wawa a mikaɾiʦ to~u ɬ~ɮo~uɬ~ɮaŋ a paħiʦəra itini to~un paɾa. o~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ itira i ŋata no~u miʡo~utʡo~utan a fakəɾo~uħ a tamɬ~ɮaw i ira a maħəɾa no~u mikakinkiwaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kakafaħəkaan a kinis a sapaɬ~ɮ, paŋaŋ ħan to~u "o~u so~umo~uwaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"ħananaj,nikawrira, masakasak no~u ʦitanəŋaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.na tajni ko~u mipatənakaj to~u so~uwaɾ ni jiso~u a jo~uro~upa a tamɬ~ɮaw i,to~uɬ~ɮo~uħən naŋra ko~una "so~umo~uwaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"to~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u rapano~u~ui,taɬ~ɮa maɾəməɬ~ɮ ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw taŋso~uɾən niŋra amiʡafas a misiməɬ~ɮ ko~u ** a pəʦiħ no~una sapaɬ~ɮ, kaɾasapaɬ~ɮən no~u tamina a miɾaɾiw tajra i ro~uma a paɾa a miɾimək,sa iraira aʦa a maʡo~usaw ko~una ** a pəʦiħ a sapaɬ~ɮ,o~u tamaanaj to~u a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ to~u sapiɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~uan a mikinkiw to~u rajraj no~u ʡo~urip no~un apaɾa. o~una"so~umawaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"to~usa a ɾajaʡ ko~u to~uʡəɬ~ɮaw,irawaʦ no~una sapaɬ~ɮ i mikiskisan to~u waɬ~ɮis no~u fo~utiŋ,ano~uʦa o~u aɬ~ɮiʦaw a fo~ukəɾo~uħ ko~u sapito~uʡto~uʡ to~u masamaamaanaj a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u fo~utiŋ,ira ko~u ʡajam,ira ko~u rəŋo~usħɬ~ɮr saʡiwas, ira ħo~u ko~u masaɾipaaj,masapo~uko~uʡaj a kinis,nikawrira, o~una"so~umawaɾaj a sapaɬ~ɮ"taħanini awaj ħo~u ko~u maɾaħəʦiaj ko~u fanaʡ to~una masamaamaanaj a ko~unis o~u maan ko~u niso~uwaɾan nira ħo~ukija? o~u pəʦiħ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u to~uʡasaj no~u rapa no~u~ui ko~unini.
